tr.td: Amlodipine (as amlodipine besylate) 2.5 mg oral tablet
1 tablet (2.5 mg) by mouth once daily
1 tablet (25 mg) by mouth once daily
1 tablet (10 mg) by mouth once daily
Acetaminophen 300 mg and codeine phosphate 15 mg oral tablet
1 tablet (300 mg/15 mg) every 4 to 6 hours as needed
Influenza virus antigen only vaccine product
Clostridium tetani toxoid antigen adsorbed only vaccine product
Live attenuated Human alphaherpesvirus 3 only vaccine product

ul.li: Increase patient understanding of hypertension and its management strategies, including lifestyle modifications such as diet, exercise, and medication adherence.
Patient will demonstrate understanding of diabetes self-management principles including diet, exercise, medication adherence, and blood glucose monitoring.
Maintain or achieve HbA1c at individualized target level.
Achieve and maintain a healthy weight as part of diabetes self-management.
Maintain blood pressure within target range as part of diabetes self-management.
Engage in at least 150 minutes of moderate-intensity physical activity per week as part of diabetes self-management.

tr.td: Pain severity - 0-10 verbal numeric rating [Score] - Reported
Blood pressure panel with all children optional
Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

ul.li: Increase patient understanding of hypertension and its management strategies, including lifestyle modifications such as diet, exercise, and medication adherence.
Patient will demonstrate understanding of diabetes self-management principles including diet, exercise, medication adherence, and blood glucose monitoring.
Maintain or achieve HbA1c at individualized target level.
Achieve and maintain a healthy weight as part of diabetes self-management.
Maintain blood pressure within target range as part of diabetes self-management.
Engage in at least 150 minutes of moderate-intensity physical activity per week as part of diabetes self-management.
